mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_transaction ( txn_id, request_id, debit_account_no, credit_account_no, txn_type, txn_status, amount, remark, txn_time, created_time ) VALUES ( #{txnId}, #{requestId}, #{debitAccountNo}, #{creditAccountNo}, #{txnType}, #{txnStatus}, #{amount}, #{remark}, #{txnTime}, #{createdTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT txn_id, request_id, debit_account_no, credit_account_no, txn_type, txn_status, amount, remark, txn_time, created_time FROM t_transaction WHERE txn_id = #{txnId}
SELECT txn_id, request_id, debit_account_no, credit_account_no, txn_type, txn_status, amount, remark, txn_time, created_time FROM t_transaction WHERE request_id = #{requestId}

SELECT txn_id, request_id, debit_account_no, credit_account_no, txn_type, txn_status, amount, remark, txn_time, created_time FROM t_transaction WHERE debit_account_no = #{accountNo} OR credit_account_no = #{accountNo} ORDER BY txn_time DESC

SELECT txn_id, request_id, debit_account_no, credit_account_no, txn_type, txn_status, amount, remark, txn_time, created_time FROM t_transaction WHERE txn_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} ORDER BY txn_time DESC
